title: Birch Bark Biting
desc: Birch Bark Biting by Susan Custer, Cree Indian. Floral pattern bitten into thin sheet of birch bark; Dimensions: Birch bark is 9.1 x 6.5 cm and pattern is 5 x 5 cm. Accession Year: 1963; Accession Number: 2804; Collected by: Frank D. Huth; Collection Site: Saskatchewan or Manitoba; Courtesy of Chicago Field Museum
